channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-03-27)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-03-27.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Gooey Audio|Gooey re-releases Shimmer. A free upgrade for licensed users. On sale for $4.99, reg. $24.99
[SAVE BIG] Vandalism Sounds|Get 96% off Ultra Vocal Infinity Bundle by Vandalism Sounds for $29 (Normally $489).?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] SampleTekk|Limited time free download: Get Singularis by Sampletekk free (normally $49).?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Excite Audio|Get Excite Audio?s Bloom Ensemble Strings Lite for $1 at Plugin Boutique (reg. $29) with the code: amacam8. (+ a free gift.).?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 99% - Desarrollador: Excite Audio - Finaliza: Unknown

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Audio Plugin Guy|Audio Plugin Guy has released a suite of free web-based apps for musicians and producers, with more on the way.?NEW?RECOMMENDED
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Audio Plugin Guy - Finaliza: None

item.title: [FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] ZAK Sound|ZAK Sound’s Raizes Player for Win, Mac & Linux is now available as a free download (previously, only available when purchasing a Raizes Instrument).?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: ZAK Sound - Finaliza: None
